hero.title: Soul Trace
hero.subtitleLine1: Walk through five gentle questions about your memories together. We’ll read your answers and reflect your companion’s spirit—
hero.subtitleLine2: then return a warm letter from the future.

form.emailPlaceholder: Email (used to sync with Eternal Beam)
form.sceneryPlaceholder: A place or scene they loved most
form.privacyConsent: The information you provide will be kept securely for Eternal Beam device setup and personalized services.

result.letterHeading: A letter to you from the future
result.instagramHint: Step 1 is done. Tap the same button again to open the share sheet. On desktop, your image may download and Instagram will open in a new tab.
result.heroImageSkipped: Background image (DALL·E) was not generated. Check OPENAI_API_KEY on the server and your billing/limits.
result.hardwareTeaser: We’ve held this letter in Eternal Beam’s light. In May, meet again in the light.

benefitModal.title: The letter you just received—we’ll keep it in your companion’s warm light.
benefitModal.description: The heart you met in Soul Trace and the precious background from DALL·E can be preserved forever through Eternal Beam’s dedicated NFC slot launching in May.
benefitModal.perkBefore: 🎁 Reserve now: we’ll make a physical NFC card with
benefitModal.perkAfter: ’s custom background theme from this session.
benefitModal.reserveCta: ➜ Claim launch perks & reserve on Eternal Beam

share.title: Soul Trace letter
share.text: Sharing a Soul Trace letter from our companion.

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.profileIncomplete: Please enter your companion’s name and a favorite scenery.
errors.privacyRequired: Please accept the privacy notice so we can securely keep your information for Eternal Beam setup and personalized services.
errors.saveImageGeneric: An error occurred while saving the image.
errors.prepareShareFailed: Something went wrong while preparing to share.

questions.promptText: When did your companion’s energy shine the brightest?
questions.placeholder: e.g. Every morning when they wagged hello at the door

questions.promptText: What scent or place did they love on walks?
questions.emphasisAfter: did they love most on walks?
questions.placeholder: e.g. The park path after rain, earth and grass

questions.promptText: How did they show love to you most often?
questions.placeholder: e.g. Resting their chin on your knee

questions.promptText: Which expression of theirs stays clearest in your mind?
questions.emphasisAfter: of theirs stays clearest in your mind?
questions.placeholder: e.g. Eyes widening at the treat bag rustle

questions.promptText: What message might they want to leave with you last?
questions.emphasisAfter: might they want to leave with you?
questions.placeholder: e.g. Please smile more than you cry for me
